title: festuca ovina var. duriuscula
intro: Festuca ovina var. duriuscula, also known as the tough fescue, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. duriuscula include reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
